name: cherrystone/diligence-timeline
title: Diligence Timeline
description: Interactive horizontal process timeline block for Diligence flow.

lede.default: We move quickly and respect your time. Click each step below to see what happens as we evaluate your application.

default.title: Founder Application
default.desc: Submit basic details about what you are scaling, your New England roots, and your current round size. Sourced and reviewed by committee.

default.title: Screening Session
default.desc: A 30-minute deep dive with 3-4 members from our screening committee. We evaluate sector alignment, stage fit, and core assumptions.

default.title: Member Diligence
default.desc: An intensive 2-3 week deep dive led by members with direct sector experience. We speak with customers, review tech, and analyze metrics.

default.title: Pitch Night Presentation
default.desc: Present to the full Cherrystone membership in Providence. 8 minutes of presentation followed by 10 minutes of active investor Q&A.

default.title: Check & Engagement
default.desc: Individual checks are pooled, and funding is completed. A lead investor joins your board or advisory committee to support scaling.
